description_long: This is a compact, industrial-style locomotive painted primarily in black with yellow and red hazard striping on the front and rear. The body features a boxy cabin with ventilation grilles and a small operator compartment, likely for a single driver. The locomotive sits on a short section of railway track, with visible wheels and undercarriage details. The sides display white text, including a serial number and company name, adding to its utilitarian appearance. There are various pipes, handrails, and mechanical components visible along the sides, suggesting a diesel or electric shunting engine. The overall design is robust, functional, and intended for heavy-duty urban or industrial rail operations.
description: A compact black locomotive with yellow and red hazard striping, boxy cabin, and industrial details, designed for shunting or short-haul rail tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow and black hazard stripes, central headlight, and coupling mechanism.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the boxy cabin, ventilation grilles, white text, and visible handrails and pipes.
description_view_2: Rear view with hazard striping, red lights, and a clear view of the back coupling and track.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with visible cabin, grilles, and mechanical details.
attribute_door_placement: single door on one side of the cabin
attribute_window_arrangement: small windows on the cabin sides
